steps.title: Compare the given angles
steps.content: Triangle $GHI$ has angles $G$ and $H$ measuring $52^\circ$ and $83^\circ$. Triangle $MNO$ has angles $M$ and $N$ measuring $52^\circ$ and $83^\circ$.

steps.title: Use angle angle similarity
steps.content:
Two triangles are similar if two pairs of corresponding angles are congruent. The problem already gives two matching angle pairs:
$$G=M=52^\circ$$
$$H=N=83^\circ$$No third angle measurement is needed. The answer is D.
